[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00111110 5
1 01011100 4
2 11111110 7
3 11111111 a
4 00111111 6
5 01011100 4
6 11111111 a
7 11111111 a
